title: Explain the significance of flex-fuel technologies in India’s energy transition. Analyse the challenges in their adoption. Suggest measures for large-scale implementation.
description: Topic: Infrastructure- Energy Q5. Explain the significance of flex-fuel technologies in India’s energy transition. Analyse the challenges in their adoption.
